utterances.speaker: All
utterances.text: Pheebs ! Hey Pheebs !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh , okay , Pheebs ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Umm , you know how the other day you were talking about how you did not get to go to London and how you were kinda feeling left out ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , well , we felt really bad about that , so we decided we should all take a little trip together !

emotion_cause.span: 6_we decided we should all take a little trip together !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ohh , that is so nice ! How great ! Well , where ? Where is the trip ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , we thought we would all go to a picnic , in Central Park !

emotion_cause.span: 8_we thought we would all go to a picnic , in Central Park !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , all of us ! All day !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That sucks !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That is not a trip !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I just came from the park !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What are we gonna high five about at the stupid Central Park ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_What are we gonna high five about at the stupid Central Park ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: " Well , it is right by my house , all right ! "

emotion_cause.span: 13_What are we gonna high five about at the stupid Central Park ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I am gonna go home and bask in the triumph of my Central Park idea .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ho ... ho ... hold on a sec there , Mr . Kissey !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You know , I have been meaning to talk to you about this whole , little , new European thing you got going on , and I just need to tell you that it makes me very uncomfortable and I just ... you know ... stop it !

emotion_cause.span: 17_this whole , little , new European thing you got going on , and I just need to tell you that it makes me very uncomfortable

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I was just trying to bring a little culture to the group .

emotion_cause.span: 17_it makes me very uncomfortable and I just ... you know ... stop it !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That is fine , just do not bring it in my mouth .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Makes me wanna puke !
